titleStmt.title: SII 27.146: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 146. (A.R. No. 579 of 1929-30.) CHOKKĀḌI, (near Yēṇaguḍḍe), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1396 (expired) (1397 current), Jaya, Chaitra śu. 13, Thursday corresponding to 1474 A.D., March 31.

It registers an agreement between the seṭṭikāṟa and the nakharahaṁjamāna of Bārakūru and the ballalas, muḍilas and the residents of Niḍuṁbūru regarding the boundaries of their lands situated in Voḍeūru. Viṭharasa-voḍeya is stated to be governing Bārakūru-rājya at that time.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ . śrī gurubhyō namaḥ . nirvighnama
stu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlasta
ṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1396 saṁdu yēḷane
ya vartamāna jayasaṁvatsarada caitra śuddha 13 guruvāradalū śrī manmahārājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa virupākṣa mahārāyaru vijayanagariya rājadhā
niyalū samastavarnnadharmāśrayaṁgaḷanū pālisi sukhasaṁkatā vinōdadiṁ rājyai
śvaryavanū pratipālisuttihakāladalū Ā virūpākṣa mahārāyara nirūpadi
[ṁda viṭha]rasavoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuva kāladalū bārakūra hattukēri
hadināṟu maṁdi seṭṭikāṟaru yeḷunūṟayeppattēḷu yeḷa*me voḷagāda nakhara haṁjamānada
samastahalaru muṁdiṭṭu yeraḍu [pakka vi]na baḷiyavarū mūḍilarū niḍuṁbararū Aṟuvaru
ballāḷaru sahitavāgi koṭa yeppatteraḍeḷame voḷagāda samastahalaru seṭṭikāṟarige ba
rasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare niḍuṁbūraru voḍelūra gaḍiyalū A
dali yeraḍu pakkada baḷiyū niḍuṁbūraru Ada[*ṟa]mēle hattukēriyū samasta ka
ṭṭaḷeyavarū niḍuṁbūraranū voḍeŪra halaru seṭṭikāṟaru saṁtaisidarāgi yī sa
mastarū voppi māḍida śāsana pramāṇina kaṭaḷeya vivara . voḍeŪra catussīmeya vivara . ha
ravariya gōḷiyiṁ paḍuvalu hoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu beṁgareyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yettu
naḍavaheddāriyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu mattaṁ Aṇiveya gaḍi guḍḍugalliṁdaṁ teṁkalu bhūta
pāṁḍyana jatigalliṁ baḍagalu yī gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage mūḍilarige niḍuṁbūrarige
Aṟuvaru ballāḷugaḷige Āvasīme saṁmaṁdhavilla mēle sāliya baḷitaḷaṁkuḷa baḷi
Ariyabaḷi yi mūṟu baḷi mūḍilapakhada voḷage niḍuṁbura pakhada voḷage
rātana baḷihaṁguḷa baḷi yī yeraḍu baḷi sahavāgi Ayidu baḷiyavarū netiyali
keyakaṭṭida gaṁḍumakkaḷu yī voḍeŪra catussīmeyali yirabāradu . yadoḷage
kada�yo mūru baḷiyauḷavaru maneyakaṭṭidare . niḍuṁbura pakkada yeraḍuba
ḷi maneyakaṭidare niḍuṁbura pakkada yeradu yeraḍu baḷimaneya kaṭṭidare . mūḍilapakkada mū
ḍila baḷimaneya va ru yāūra gaḍiyoḷage billāḷige biṭu baṁṭage
ḍi billaguḍḍe niḍuṁbūru �yo mūṟu ko toḷage billavaru yeleyaṁ bitti salladu .
yella yeṁbiliye beḷatatigeyū māḍisikoḷade jōḷasalladu . yi śāsana pramāṇaṁge vo
ḍe Ūra Aṟavatu seṭikāraroḷage Ayidu baḷiya janahokku baḷasidare A
bida seṭṭikāṟa sāviradayiṁnūṟu hoṁnu tetubaha yeppatteraḍahoḷage Ārobbaru
tappi baḷiyahokku baḷasidare Avara huyila hattukēri voleya mūṟu
ru yi kaṭṭaḷe Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍavaṁtāgi bārakūra hattukēriya dikkina baḷi
mūḍilaru niḍuṁburaru Aṟuvata ballāḷugaḷu voḍeūra halaru seṭṭikāṟaru sahitavāgi
barasinaṭṭa śilāśāsana �yo śāsana pramāṇigaḷāru tappidavaru varaṇāsiyalli sāvirada
yiṁnūru kavileya vadhisida dōṣakke hōharu yi śāsana pramāṇige bārakūru hattukēri
hadināṟumaṁdi seṭṭikāṟaru yeḷunūṟa yaṁṭṭu taḷada voḷagāda nakhara haṁjamānada sa
mastahalara voppa śrīnārāyaṇadēvaru mūḍilaravoppa niḍubarara
voppa yeraḍu pakkada dikkina baḷi tore samastaṁra voppa Aruvaru ba
llāḷugaḷa voppa voḍeŪra Aṟuvaru yellā terada
seṭṭikārara voppa .
Digital edition of SII 27.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
